{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/262839898?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bugbunny-research", "id": 262839898, "login": "bugbunny-research", "node_id": "U_kgDOD6qeWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53926", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-613", "name": "Insufficient Session Expiration"}], "description": "### Summary
OAuth access and refresh tokens were not revoked when the user changed, reset, or
recovered their password, leaving an attacker-issued OAuth grant valid after the user
believed they had locked the attacker out.

### Details
`revokeAllOAuthTokensByUser` in the users service was an empty stub being called from
`passwordChange`, `passwordForgot`, and `passwordReset`. It now delegates to
`OAuthToken.revokeAllByUser(userId)`, which deletes the rows and invalidates the
related auth caches. All three reset/recovery flows now consistently revoke refresh
tokens (GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw), OAuth tokens (this advisory), and rotate
`token_version`.

### Impact
Persistent unauthorized access through previously issued OAuth tokens after a
documented security event (password change, forgot, or reset).

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@bugbunny-research](https://github.com/bugbunny-research).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00295, "percentile": 0.21037}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g72g-r7m4-9x4g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:43:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g72g-r7m4-9x4g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g72g-r7m4-9x4g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53926"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:43:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-g72g-r7m4-9x4g", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g72g-r7m4-9x4g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-g72g-r7m4-9x4g", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: OAuth Tokens Persist Through Security Events", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:24:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g72g-r7m4-9x4g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
title: NocoDB: OAuth Tokens Persist Through Security Events
